stemHtml: A pilot is working for an Operator that has only one aircraft type and variant in their fleet. The Operator is introducing a new aircraft that is considered to be a different variant of the same type. What shall the pilot do in order to be able operate on both variants? The pilot…

options.a: Must complete familiarisation training including theoretical knowledge training to acquire additional training.
options.b: Does NOT require any additional training as both aircraft are considered the same type.
options.c: Must complete differences training containing both theoretical and practical training.
options.d: Must complete a type rating on the new variant and afterwards a skill test.
